log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, possibly a spreader with overlay capabilities. Investigate the types of IOCs available.
There are 2 unique IPs and 3 unique domains involved in the network activity. Investigate the network activity to gather more information.

There are no persistence keys found in the registry changes. Investigate the dropped files to see if there are any suspicious files written to disk.
